episodes.title: Pam Bondi testifies about Epstein files release
episodes.description:
The former Attorney General spoke to lawmakers behind closed doors Friday but from a copy of her opening statement, we know she defended the handling of the release of the Epstein files while she was in charge of the DOJ.

episodes.title: LEGAL ANALYST: Bank of America settles Epstein lawsuit, denies wrongdoing
episodes.description:
Lawsuit claims the Charlotte banking giant actively concealed evidence of the sex trafficking scheme.
